summary: P0 REGRESSION HOTFIX ATTEMPT 2 - VERIFIED SUCCESSFUL. Admin Users page horizontal overflow regression is FIXED. All viewports (1280x720, 1366x768, 1440x900, 1920x1080) show NO page-level horizontal overflow. All 9 admin sections pass overflow test at 1280px. Users section functionality fully working.

hotfix_validation.issue: Admin panel content clipped/horizontal overflow on smaller monitors
fixes_validated: App.js line 1757: Outer container has 'min-h-screen' (no 'flex' class) - sidebar is position:fixed
App.css lines 200-211: .admin-content has width: calc(100vw - 240px), min-width: 0, overflow-x: hidden
AdminUsersSection.js: No min-w-[900px] on table (confirmed via grep - not found)
hotfix_validation.root_cause: Original issue: outer wrapper had 'flex' class but sidebar is position:fixed, causing improper width calculation
hotfix_validation.status: VERIFIED - All 3 fixes correctly applied and working

users_section_functionality_tests.row_click_opens_details: PASS - User details panel opened correctly

critical_code_review_comments: CSS fix correctly constrains .admin-content with calc(100vw - 240px) and min-width:0 for flex shrinking
Removing 'flex' from outer container fixed the root cause since sidebar is position:fixed
Table horizontal scroll is contained within card (no min-w-[900px] forcing page overflow)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 REGRESSION HOTFIX VERIFIED. Admin panel horizontal overflow is FIXED. Key validation: document.documentElement.scrollWidth === document.documentElement.clientWidth at all viewports. All 9 admin sections have no page-level overflow. Users section fully functional.
